description: Create the full MDWA product page at /pages/mdwa.html with product information in question-style language, premium table, and error-free data lookup calculator
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mdwa.html following the exact structure and patterns from /pages/mdla.html (hero section, content sections, calculator, CTA, footer)

Use the same HTML skeleton: DOCTYPE, head with meta tags, title 'MDWA - Manulife Dynamic Wealth Assurance | PROJECTCUAN', link to /assets/style.css, dark mode script, inline <style> for page-specific styles (use Manulife blue color scheme like mdla.html)

Include
at start of body and
before closing body, plus to load components

HERO SECTION: Badge 'Manulife Indonesia', H1 in question-style like 'Bagaimana Jika Ada Produk Tabungan yang Memberikan Hasil DIJAMIN Tanpa Risiko Investasi?', description of MDWA as wealth accumulation product, stats (Min Premi Rp 50 Jt, Usia 30 hr-85 th, 3 Plan), WhatsApp CTA button, breadcrumb nav

PLANS SECTION: 3 plan cards - Plan A (Anuitas/Penghasilan Tahunan), Plan B (Beasiswa/Dana Pendidikan), Plan C (Combo/Gabungan). Each with key features list. Use question-style section title like 'Pernahkah Anda Membayangkan Tabungan yang Memberikan Penghasilan Tahunan DIJAMIN?'

KEUNGGULAN SECTION: 6 advantage cards covering: GIO (tanpa medical), Manfaat DIJAMIN, Lebih Tinggi dari Deposito, 3 Plan Fleksibel, Riders (ALP Plus/WOP Plus/Payor Benefit Plus), Mata Uang IDR & USD. Use question-style heading.

KETENTUAN SECTION: Eligibility cards - Usia Masuk (30 hari-85 thn sekaligus, 30 hari-70 thn regular), Min Premi (IDR: 50jt sekaligus/24jt regular, USD: 5000/2400), Masa Pertanggungan, Underwriting GIO, Riders, Mata Uang

TABEL PREMI SECTION: Display premium tables from the Sample/Mdwa.html source data - show Plan A IDR tables for Manfaat Tunai 50 Juta and 100 Juta with columns: Term, MPP, Premi, Total Manfaat. Use the premi-table class pattern from mps-flexi.html

KALKULATOR SECTION (CRITICAL): Build an error-free data lookup calculator. Form inputs: Besar Manfaat (dropdown: 50 Juta, 100 Juta), Masa Pertanggungan (dropdown: 20 Tahun, 30 Tahun), Gender (Pria/Wanita radio-style buttons), Usia (dropdown: 25,30,35,40,45,50,55,60). Embed the full JSON premium data as a JavaScript object. On input change, perform EXACT lookup from the JSON - no mathematical formulas, no interpolation, no rounding. Display: Premi Dasar (base_benefits lookup), Premi Rider ALP+ (rider lookup by gender+age), and Total (sum of both). Show 'Data tidak tersedia' if combination not found.
CTA SECTION: Final call-to-action section with gradient background, question-style heading, WhatsApp button
Ensure all WhatsApp links use number 6287781896087 with pre-filled text about MDWA
Use fade-up and stagger-N classes for scroll animations consistent with other pages
Format all currency values with Indonesian format (Rp xxx.xxx.xxx) using toLocaleString('id-ID')
acceptance_criteria: File /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mdwa.html exists and is valid HTML
Page loads shared CSS from /assets/style.css and main.js from /assets/main.js
Header and footer divs are present for component loading
Content is written in question-style language (bahasa pertanyaan)
Premium table displays accurate data matching the Sample/Mdwa.html source
Calculator uses EXACT JSON data lookup - no formulas, no interpolation
Calculator inputs: Besar Manfaat, Masa Pertanggungan, Gender, Usia
Calculator returns exact Premi Dasar and Premi Rider values from embedded JSON
Calculator displays 'Data tidak tersedia' for invalid combinations
All currency values formatted as Indonesian Rupiah (Rp xxx.xxx.xxx)
Page follows the same visual style as mdla.html (Manulife blue color scheme, card-based sections, section tags)
Dark mode support via CSS variables and html.dark selectors
verification: Run: grep -c '527500000' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mdwa.html (should be >= 1 - verifying JSON data is embedded)
Run: grep -c '133125200' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mdwa.html (should be >= 1 - verifying rider data is embedded)

Run: node -e "const html = require('fs').readFileSync('/projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mdwa.html','utf8'); console.log(html.includes('Besar Manfaat') && html.includes('Masa Pertanggungan') && html.includes('Gender') && html.includes('Usia') ? 'CALCULATOR_INPUTS_OK' : 'MISSING_INPUTS')"
